description_long: This wheelchair features a sturdy metallic frame with a matte finish, supporting a wide, black fabric seat and backrest. The large rear wheels are spoked and have textured tires for traction, while the smaller front caster wheels provide maneuverability. The armrests are straight and parallel, constructed from the same metal tubing as the frame, and the footrests are flat, rectangular platforms extending forward. Push handles are present at the top rear, designed for an attendant to grip and push the chair. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and ease of use in urban environments such as sidewalks and public buildings. The wheelchair's construction suggests it is intended for everyday mobility and accessibility.
description: A robust, metal-framed wheelchair with large spoked rear wheels, black fabric seating, and flat footrests. It features push handles and a practical, urban-ready design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide black backrest, push handles, and the tops of the large spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spoked rear wheel, straight armrest, and flat footrest platform.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the broad seat, dual footrests, and the alignment of the armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the spoked wheel, armrest, and footrest from the opposite side.
attribute_wheel_type: Spoked rear wheels (2 large), solid front caster wheels (2 small); rear wheels have textured tires and visible spokes.
attribute_frame_design: Rigid frame with straight tubular metal construction and parallel armrests; no visible folding mechanism.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed, flat, rectangular footrests extending forward; non-detachable and non-elevating.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard push handles at the rear, straight and cylindrical, positioned at the top of the backrest.
